title: polyscias samoensis
intro: Polyscias samoensis, also known as the Samoan cabbage tree or 'ie 'ie, is a plant species native to Samoa, belonging to the family Araliaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in Samoan medicine, and its medicinal properties include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Polyscias samoensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Traditionally, the plant can be prepared as a herbal infusion or applied topically as a poultice to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
